history.note: new sweep finding, first grounding. runs.cmd: python3 -c "import json; ts=[t for t in json.load(open('/Users/david/Projects/workflowsPiExtension/.context/tasks.json'))['tasks'] if t.get('id')=='TASK-068']; print(json.dumps({'id':'TASK-068','status': ts[0]['status'], 'notes': ts[0].get('notes'), 'n_acceptance_criteria': len(ts[0].get('acceptance_criteria',[]))}))"
runs.output: {"id": "TASK-068", "status": "planned", "notes": "Addresses FGAP-098. Prerequisite for addressing issue-004 by a task. Catalog back-port interacts with FGAP-094, TASK-066, TASK-067.", "n_acceptance_criteria": 8}

runs.cmd: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/Users/david/Projects/workflowsPiExtension/.context/framework-gaps.json')); gs=[g for v in d.values() if isinstance(v,list) for g in v if isinstance(g,dict) and g.get('id')=='FGAP-098']; print(json.dumps({'id':'FGAP-098','status': gs[0]['status'], 'closed_by': gs[0].get('closed_by'), 'title': gs[0].get('title')}))"
runs.output: {"id": "FGAP-098", "status": "identified", "closed_by": null, "title": "Issues are not a gap-sibling first-class open-work kind \u2014 a task cannot focus on / address an issue as it can a gap"}
